prompt: We are a US-headquartered technology company with €200M in EU revenue from our German and French subsidiaries combined. The German subsidiary has 600 employees and is not listed. Does CSRD apply to us as a non-EU company, and what do we need to do?
assertions: Confirms CSRD applies citing non-EU company threshold (>€150M EU turnover)
Identifies German subsidiary qualifies as a large EU company
States first mandatory reporting year is FY 2028 (published 2029)
Explains EU subsidiary must file ESRS-compliant reports
Notes equivalence condition — US frameworks not yet recognised as equivalent
